allow: Bash(../../venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import socket; s=socket.socket\(\); result=s.connect_ex\(\(''localhost'', 8000\)\); print\(''Port 8000:'', ''OPEN'' if result==0 else ''CLOSED''\); s.close\(\)")

Bash(../venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import socket; s=socket.socket\(\); r=s.connect_ex\(\(''127.0.0.1'',8000\)\); print\(''Port 8000:'', ''OPEN - server is running'' if r==0 else ''CLOSED - server is NOT running''\); s.close\(\)")
